use_cases: Displaying digital identity cards in user verification flows
Employee badge representation in HR management systems
Patient ID cards in healthcare portals
Age verification cards for age-restricted services
ai_summary: A sleek verification card component displaying identity information with a customizable background image and dark overlay for text contrast. Uses framer-motion for smooth entrance animation and renders key fields including label, masked ID number, name, and validity date. Designed for fintech KYC flows, employee verification systems, and any identity documentation display use case.
